start.welcome:
👋 *Welcome to DevCraft Studio!*

I build landing pages, Telegram bots and FastAPI web services. Pick an action:
start.choose_lang: 🌍 Choose language / Выберите язык / Sprache wählen:

landing.title: 🌐 Landing pages & business cards
landing.text:
Responsive layout, clean code, instant load.
Timeline: 3–7 days.
Price: from {price}.

bot.title: 🤖 Telegram bots
bot.text:
From FAQ bots to complex systems with payments and CRM.
Timeline: 5–14 days.
Price: from {price}.

api.title: ⚙️ Web services & APIs
api.text:
FastAPI/Django backend with REST, DB, Docker deploy.
Timeline: 7–21 days.
Price: from {price}.

portfolio.title:
*Portfolio*

Selected projects. See the full list on the website.

contact.ask_email: Nice to meet you! Now drop your email so I can reach back:
contact.invalid_email: That email doesn't look right. Try again:
contact.thanks: ✅ *Thanks, {name}!* Request #{id} received. I'll reply within 2 hours.

about.text:
*DevCraft Studio*

Full-stack development since 2021.
• 40+ projects shipped
• Stack: Python, FastAPI, Django, aiogram, PostgreSQL, Docker
• 12+ UI languages
• Localization: RU / EN / DE / ES / FR

Open source on GitHub.
